title: Khushi
desc: A young man from a non-religious family falls in love with his rival's daughter, the child of a strict Hindu leader, sparking conflict between love, faith, and family pride.

title: Kyon Ki.Its Fate
desc: Anand loses his fiancee in a tragic accident and ends up in a psychiatric hospital. His doctor, Tanvi, falls for him-but her father stands against their love due to Anand's past.

title: Milenge Milenge
desc: Priya falls for Immy, believing he's her soulmate. Differences pull them apart, but fate keeps bringing them back, proving some connections are meant to last despite everything.

title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
desc: Suraj, an eligible bachelor, faces repeated rejections from prospective brides' families, only to discover that a wedding detective, Madhu Mangal Rane, is secretly behind his misfortunes.

title: Khiladi
desc: Raj, Neelam, and Boney prank Sheetal's father with a fake kidnapping, but chaos ensues when Sheetal goes missing, putting them under suspicion and testing their innocence.

title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
desc: Balwant, an honest truck driver, is pulled into a life of crime while seeking revenge for his brother's death. But as his actions spiral, his children step in to stop him and bring him back.

title: Love Hostel
desc: Amidst bloodshed, deception, and desperate escapes, Jyothi and Ashu elope, prompting her family to hire a ruthless mercenary to hunt them down and end their love.

title: Don - The Chase Begins Again
desc: Vijay, a lookalike of Don, is hired to uncover Don's secrets. After DCP D'Silva dies, Vijay struggles to prove his real identity and survive.

title: Pure Bollywood
desc: Bollywood songs - catchy, emotional, and upbeat - dominate the charts. From heartbreak to celebration, these tracks capture every mood, making people dance, cry, and sing along everywhere.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
desc: Twin brothers Kishen and Kanhaiya, separated at birth-one rich, one poor-reunite years later to join forces and battle evil, proving blood ties conquer all odds.

title: King Uncle
desc: Industrialist Ashok Bansal's stern ways push his siblings away. When orphan girl Munna arrives, her warmth slowly melts his cold heart, bringing family back together.

title: Yamla Pagla Deewana 2
desc: Dharam and Gajodhar, a father-son duo, pose as owners of a huge company to con a business tycoon, but things spiral when Gajodhar's brother joins the scheme.

title: Jawaani Jaaneman
desc: Jazz, a carefree 40-year-old casanova in London, has his world turned upside down when Tia, claiming to be his daughter, enters his life and forces him to change.

title: Sooryavanshi
desc: With Mumbai under threat of a major terrorist attack, ATS chief Sooryavanshi launches a high-stakes mission to track down 600 kg of missing RDX and the masterminds behind the plot.

title: Jaat
desc: In a quiet coastal village ruled by fear, Varadaraja Ranatunga's tyranny goes unchecked-until a wandering stranger's clash with his men exposes the villagers' silent suffering.

title: Sam Bahadur
desc: Sam Manekshaw, one of India's most decorated army officers, served for over four decades, fought five wars, and became the first Indian officer to be promoted to Field Marshal.

title: Krantiveer
desc: Pratap, disowned by his parents, finds himself in a small village ruled by gangsters and corrupt politicians. He faces tough challenges as he tries to navigate this dangerous world.
